articles.title: Circle discloses full breakdown of $55.7B USDC reserves
articles.description: As of June 30, about 75.6% of Circle’s reserves were held in U.S. Treasuries and 24.4% were held in cash at regulated financial institutions.

articles.description: Steady adoption and internal growth back MATIC’s 118% gain, even as most altcoins struggle to hold on to their short-term gains.

articles.title: MATIC Sees Huge Bullish Boost After Disney Selected Polygon For Its 2022 Accelerator Program
articles.description: The news that Ethereum layer 2 scaling platform Polygon has been chosen to take part in Disney’s prestigious accelerator program has given its native token MATIC a notable bullish boost.

articles.title: Polygon Climbs 20% On Disney Glee – Can MATIC Sustain Gains This Month?
articles.description: MATIC, the native token of Polygon, is the highest performing cryptocurrency in CoinMarketCap’s top 50 list by market capitalization over the past 24 hours, with gains of about 20%. MATIC reached its highest level since early June, in the mid-$6.0 range, a day after Polygon was selected for Walt Disney’s benchmark business growth program.
